display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LIGHT state in:
position (x,y,z) . current_brightness
falloff_radius . falloff_scale (sx,sy,sz) . falloff_rotation

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 . displacement
d = panel_pos - light.position -> (dx, dy, dz)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 . rotate dx,dz around Y by falloff_rotation
(beam can be steered: SWEEP / FOCUS gestures)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 . anisotropic scale (stretch the field per axis)
sdx = dx/sx . sdy = dy/sy . sdz = dz/sz

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 . scaled distance
r = sqrt(sdx^2 + sdy^2 + sdz^2)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 . linear falloff
f = max(0, 1 - r / falloff_radius)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 . apply intensity
brightness = current_brightness x f

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 . clamp to DMX byte
int( max(0, min(255, brightness)) )

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
current_brightness = brightness_min
+ (brightness_max - brightness_min) x (sin(pulse_phase)+1)/2
(the pulse / breathing, updated each frame)

svg.text: C3 Light state to one panel value — get_panel_brightness() (runs x12 per frame)
